title: Client Connection and World Load
interaction_flow: NetClient → NetClient: reset()  [clears Groups, removed set, flags connecting=true, net.setClientLoaded(false)]
NetClient → Net: send(ConnectPacket{name, uuid, usid, locale, mods, versionType, color})
--- Phase 2: Server signals world data incoming ---
NetworkIO → GameState: state.wave, wavetime, tick = stream.readInt/Float/Double
NetworkIO → Player: player.reset(); player.read(new Reads(stream)); player.add()
SaveVersion → ContentLoader: reads type+total+name[] per ContentType → builds MappableContent[][] map
NetworkIO → SaveVersion: readMap(stream, world.context)  [reads width/height, tile floor/block IDs]
NetworkIO → SaveVersion: readTeamBlocks(stream)  [reads building states per team]
Net → NetClient: @Remote entitySnapshot(short amount, byte[] data)  [UDP, low priority]
NetClient → EntityMapping: EntityMapping.map(typeID).get()  [factory by type byte]
EntityMapping → Syncc: creates new entity instance
NetClient → Syncc: entity.add()  [if not already tracked]
Net → NetClient: @Remote blockSnapshot(short amount, byte[] data)  [UDP, low priority]
BuildingComp → BuildingComp: readBase(read)  [items/power/liquids modules via moduleBitmask]
Net → NetClient: @Remote stateSnapshot(waveTime, wave, enemies, paused, gameOver, timeData, tps, rand0, rand1, coreData[])
NetClient → GameState: state.wave, wavetime, gameOver, serverTps updated
NetClient → TeamData: cores.first().items.read(dataReads)  [core item counts per team]
NetClient → Net: sync()  [every 66ms: Call.clientSnapshot(...) sends player unit state to server]
key_type_io_operations: writeContent(Writes, Content): write.b(type.ordinal), write.s(cont.id) — readContent uses temporaryMapper
writeUnit(Writes, Unit): write.i(unit.id) — readUnit looks up Groups.sync by id
key_relationships: NetClient implements ApplicationListener (update() called each frame)
NetClient depends_on NetworkIO (loadWorld for world deserialization)
NetClient depends_on Net (packet handling, send, setClientLoaded)
NetClient depends_on Groups (entity registry, clear, getByID)
SaveVersion depends_on ContentLoader (setTemporaryMapper for ID remapping)
TypeIO provides static read/write helpers used by packet serialization
EntityMapping maps typeID byte → entity factory (Prov<Entityc>)
state_transitions: On worldDataBegin(): Groups cleared, logic reset
On WorldStream received + loadWorld done: finishConnecting() sets State.playing, connecting=false, clientLoaded=true
On Disconnect: connecting=false, logic.reset(), State back to menu
important_notes: World stream is DEFLATE compressed (InflaterInputStream wraps WorldStream.stream)
Content remapping: server writes content names; client builds ID→MappableContent[][] via readContentHeader, then resets with setTemporaryMapper(null) after load
Entity sync is UDP (unreliable, low priority); entitySnapshot encodes amount+bytes; readSyncEntity reads int id + byte typeID per entity
blockSnapshot reads (int pos, short blockId) per building and calls tile.build.readSync(reads, version)
ConnectPacket fields: name, locale, mods (Seq<String>), mobile, versionType, color (RGBA int), usid (8-byte Base64), uuid
Timeout: 30s (dataTimeout=60*30 ticks) during connecting; 20s (entitySnapshotTimeout ms) for UDP snapshot silence in-game
NetClient.sync() runs every 66ms (playerSyncTime) sending clientSnapshot; ping every 1s; plan sync every 0.5s
